question: Choose the correct sentence:
explanation: Past Simple talks about finished actions in the past (yesterday, last week, in 2020). Use past verb forms, and use did/didn’t for questions and negatives.
explanation_simple: Past Simple: yesterday/last… Regular verb + -ed; irregular has special form. Negatives/questions use did/didn’t + base verb.
explanation_detailed:
Step 1: Look for past time words: yesterday, last night, last week, last year.
Step 2: For actions, use the past form of the verb (regular: -ed; irregular: special form).
Step 3: For negatives, use didn’t + base verb (not past form).
Step 4: For questions, start with Did + subject + base verb.
Step 5: For ‘to be’, use was/were (no did).
